examples: For desolate, undulating Saharan sand dunes, endless unpeopled beaches and sand-drifted streets, you can't do better.
Was it the romance of wood fires, the discretion of heavy coats that attracted my mother to the northern and unpeopled places of Europe?
The first day of the trail crosses the wide open desert panoramas of Euro Ridge, advancing to the breathtaking, unpeopled expanse seen from Brinkley Bluff on day four or five.
